visual_description: Three men in dark clothing stand in a dimly lit, cluttered room, each holding a wand pointed forward. The central figure, with platinum blonde hair, stands slightly ahead of the others, while the two flanking him hold their wands steady with focused postures. Their gazes are directed forward, and their facial expressions are serious and intent.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a low pitch and moderate pace, speaking in a neutral tone without any noticeable inflection.
